title: Bunnyberg's PBR 3D Items
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KO0KbF19eB0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


IMPORTANT INSTALL:[ETF] Entity Texture Features AND [EMF] Entity Model Features

Recommendation to install the following:

- Punchy
- SPBR
- Fresh Foods
- IterationRP (Shader)
- respackopts
- Bunnyberg's Dynamic Brewing Stands

![Priority arrangement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4b7faa1afbe691c4b8026ee3accf5a47fa357f_0.webp)

Instructions for best experience:
- Select labpbr in your shader settings
- With complimentary shader use unbound
- turn on brewing stand skin when dynamic brewing stand is active
